title: Camps * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Camps * AIDS/HIV 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community AIDS/HIV Autism Spectrum Disorder Disabilities Issues Families/Friends of People With Cancer Former Foster Children Foster Children Muscular Dystrophy Native American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADE AIDS PROJECT CAMP KC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a week-long camp. Provides parental support, parent-child activities, social groups, and education materials. Camp activities may include swimming, arts and crafts, dance classes, nature hikes, and more. 520 NW Davis Street Suite 215 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Families with children ages 5-15 who are living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Varies by camp Email (503) 278-3812 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT CAMP KC
